de.uka.ilkd.key.taclettranslation.assumptions

Class DefaultTacletSetTranslation

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.taclettranslation.assumptions.DefaultTacletSetTranslation
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    TacletSetTranslation, TranslationListener

    public final class DefaultTacletSetTranslation
extends Object
implements TacletSetTranslation, TranslationListener

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private ImmutableList<String> instantiationFailures
      If a instantiation failure occurs the returned information is stored in a String.
      private ImmutableList<TacletFormula> notTranslated
      Taclets can not be translated because checking the taclet failed.
      private Services services 
      private SMTSettings settings 
      private boolean translate
      if translate is true the method getTranslation() will first translate the given taclets before it returns translation.
      private ImmutableList<TacletFormula> translation
      Translation of the taclets stored in taclets.
      private ImmutableSet<Sort> usedFormulaSorts 
      private HashSet<SchemaVariable> usedFormulaSV 
      private HashSet<QuantifiableVariable> usedQuantifiedVariable
      Shema variables of the type Variable that have been used while translating the set of taclets.
      private HashSet<Sort> usedSorts
      Sorts that have been used while translating the set of taclets.

      Called when the translator finds a term that has a quantified variable.

      Returns all taclet that have not been translated.

    • Field Detail

      • translate

        private boolean translate
        if translate is true the method getTranslation() will first translate the given taclets before it returns translation.

        private ImmutableList<TacletFormula> translation
        Translation of the taclets stored in taclets.

        private ImmutableList<TacletFormula> notTranslated
        Taclets can not be translated because checking the taclet failed.

        Shema variables of the type Variable that have been used while translating the set of taclets.

                                   SMTSettings settings)

    • Method Detail

      • getTranslation

        public ImmutableList<TacletFormula> getTranslation(ImmutableSet<Sort> sorts)
        Description copied from interface: TacletSetTranslation
        Builds the translation of the taclets given by calling the method setTacletSet().
        Specified by:
        getTranslation in interface TacletSetTranslation
        Parameters:
        sorts - this sorts are used for the instantiation of generic types.
        Returns:
        returns the resulting formulae of the taclets. Each formula of the resulting set is associated with one taclet.

      • getNotTranslated

        public ImmutableList<TacletFormula> getNotTranslated()
        Description copied from interface: TacletSetTranslation
        Returns all taclet that have not been translated. The reason can be got by TacletFormula.getStatus().
        Specified by:
        getNotTranslated in interface TacletSetTranslation
        Returns:
        a list of taclets.

      • update

        public void update()
        Description copied from interface: TacletSetTranslation
        Updates the translation, i.d. the given list of taclets is being translated again.
        Specified by:
        update in interface TacletSetTranslation

      • storeToFile

        public void storeToFile(String dest)
        Stores the translation to a file by using the key-format for problem files.
        Parameters:
        dest - the path of the file.

      • toString

        public String toString()
        Overrides:
        toString in class Object

      • convertTerm

        private String convertTerm(Term term)

      • eventSort

        public void eventSort(Sort sort)
        Description copied from interface: TranslationListener
        Called when the translator finds a term that have a sort. You can use this event to collect all sorts that are used.
        Specified by:
        eventSort in interface TranslationListener
        Parameters:
        sort - the sort that has been found.

      • eventQuantifiedVariable

        public void eventQuantifiedVariable(QuantifiableVariable var)
        Description copied from interface: TranslationListener
        Called when the translator finds a term that has a quantified variable. You can use this event to collect all quantified variables that are used.
        Specified by:
        eventQuantifiedVariable in interface TranslationListener
        Parameters:
        var - the quantified variable that has been found.

      • eventFormulaSV

        public void eventFormulaSV(SchemaVariable formula)
        Description copied from interface: TranslationListener
        Called when the translator finds a schema variable of type formula. You can use this event to collect all schema variables of type formula that are used.
        Specified by:
        eventFormulaSV in interface TranslationListener

      • eventInstantiationFailure

        public boolean eventInstantiationFailure(GenericSort dest,
                                         Sort sort,
                                         Taclet t,
                                         Term term)
        Description copied from interface: TranslationListener
        Called when the translator can not instantiate a generic sort with a particular sort in the given term. The result type determines whether the translation is aborted: The idea is, to make the translation robust against invalid instantiation.
        Specified by:
        eventInstantiationFailure in interface TranslationListener
        Parameters:
        dest - the generic sort to instantiate
        sort - the instantiation sort.
        t - the taclet thats belongs to the term
        term - the term to be instantiated
        Returns:
        return true if you want to terminate the translation of the taclet, otherwise false.
